basic_details.job_title: BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate 1 Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Birla Institute of Technology and Science, Pilani (BITS Pilani)
basic_details.short_information: Birla Institute of Technology and Science, Pilani (BITS Pilani) has published the Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate I Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate I position. Candidates with a maximum age limit of 30 years and holding a First Class M.Sc. in Chemistry or Physics, or B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, or other allied engineering disciplines with experience in Computer-Aided Design (CAD), chemical synthesis, and electrode fabrication (NET/ GATE qualification desirable) are eligible to apply through

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years. Age relaxation as per Govt. of India Norms.

qualification.education_qualification: First Class M.Sc. in Chemistry or Physics, or B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, or other allied engineering disciplines, with experience in Computer-Aided Design (CAD), Chemical synthesis, and electrode fabrication, Desirable: NET/GATE qualified
qualification.details: First Class M.Sc. in Chemistry or Physics, or B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, or other allied engineering disciplines. Experience in Computer-Aided Design (CAD), Chemical synthesis, and electrode fabrication is required. Desirable: NET/GATE qualified.

salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- + 10% HRA (As per Institute Rule) per month as JRF for NET/GATE Candidates. Rs. 30,000/- + 10% HRA (As per Institute Rule) per month as Project Associate-I for Non Net/GATE Candidates.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on merit and experience Online Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate-1 Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 27-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the BITS Pilani Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate-1 Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 27-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate-1 Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate-1 recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate-1 recruitment is 27th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates should have a First Class M.Sc. in Chemistry or Physics, or a B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, or other allied engineering disciplines. Experience in CAD, chemical synthesis, and electrode fabrication is also required.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation will be provided as per the Government of India norms for candidates belonging to reserved categories.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate-1 position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 37,000/- + 10% HRA per month for NET/GATE qualified candidates (JRF) and Rs. 30,000/- + 10% HRA per month for non-NET/GATE candidates (Project Associate-I).

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply by sending their resume and required documents via email to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure to clearly state the post applied for in the subject line.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their merit and experience, followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate-1.

faq.question: Q9. Where is BITS Pilani located?
faq.answer: BITS Pilani is located in Pilani, Rajasthan.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for this position is contractual.
